title: eryngium sanguisorba f. rosulatum
intro: Eryngium sanguisorba f. rosulatum, also known as sea holly, is a flowering plant species in the genus Eryngium. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. In herbal preparations, Eryngium sanguisorba f. rosulatum is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
